1500900001.english: Master, there’s a bioloid being chased over there…!

1500900002.english: It’s Rhode, just as I thought!!

1500900003.korean: 각하, 철충에게 쫓기는 바이오로이드를 육안으로 확인했습니다.
1500900003.english: Sir, I’ve spotted a bioloid being pursued by an Ironworm with my own eyes.

1500900006.korean: 스틸 라인 부대! 지금부터 전투에 돌입한다!
1500900006.english: Steel Line unit! Commence combat now!

1500900007.english: Let’s show those guys our true strength!

1500900008.english: Rhode, wait! I’ll save you right now!
